programme.title: Continuum (2012)
programme.desc: Kiera and Brad's trust reaches the breaking point.

programme.title: Continuum (2012)
programme.desc: Kiera pushes Carlos' patience to the limit as she pressures him for more time. Kellogg faces unexpected peril.

programme.title: Fringe
programme.desc: The Alternate Fringe team investigates a bioterrorist armed with an insect that has a taste for human flesh. And Walternate discovers a line he will not cross.

programme.title: Fringe
programme.desc: A series of Fringe events leads the team to the home of a woman grieving over the death of her husband, while Peter and Olivia try to repair the emotional rift between them.

programme.title: Fringe
programme.desc: The Fringe team revisits the past.

programme.title: Fringe
programme.desc: The Fringe Team investigates a group of thieves who can break the laws of gravity. Meanwhile, Walter attempts to delay the damage he's caused to the fabric of the universe.

programme.title: Naked Science
programme.desc: The Earth hurtles through space protected by an invisible force field, known as a magnetosphere.

programme.title: Naked Science
programme.desc: Almost every culture on Earth tells the story of an ancient flood – details vary but the basic plot is the same - An angry God wipes out an unrepentant population.

programme.title: Space: The New Frontier: Cosmic Collisions
programme.desc: Space is vast, yet it is full of collisions. Gas and dust electrostatically flock together, and gravity takes over coalescing grains into rocks. Those rocks become boulders, then asteroids colliding again and again, striking planets and each other.

programme.title: Space: The New Frontier: Gravity
programme.desc: Gravity keeps us on the ground and the planets in their orbits, yet we only notice it when it's not there. In space we cheat gravity; falling just as fast but missing the ground. Now this fundamental universal force is slowly giving up its secrets.

programme.title: Space: The New Frontier: Interface
programme.desc: The interface between Earth and space is the Ionosphere, a region of rarified gas and charged particles. It is very important for radio communications, radar, satellite signals and global positioning. Yet we know so little about it.

programme.title: Space: The New Frontier: From There to Here
programme.desc: The sky above is studded with stars and countless galaxies. In them, we can read not only our origin, but also our final destination. Technology is on the brink of taking us to places we have only dreamed of.

programme.title: Space: The New Frontier: Return to the Moon
programme.desc: The moon is our closest celestial companion. It lights our night sky and gently tugs at our shores. Few have walked on her surface, but her allure remains strong.

programme.title: Space: The New Frontier: The Inner Worlds
programme.desc: They orbit between our planet and our star. Mercury and Venus make up half of our terrestrial planets, but we still know very little about them. As we take a closer look at our companions, we find more questions than answers.

programme.title: Space: The New Frontier: Next Stop Mars
programme.desc: Mars has fired our imagination for thousands of years. The tantilizing possibility of life has made it the most inviting planet in our solar system. It is the only other place that man may one day call home.

programme.title: Space: The New Frontier: The Planet Makers
programme.desc: From the beginnings of our solar system 4.5 billions years ago, there remain many clues to reveal its evolution. Remnant debris, asteroids, and comets are what's left of the building blocks to our celestial neighborhood.

programme.title: Cosmic Vistas: Grand Design
programme.desc: The Hubble telescope finds design on a grand scale, especially when it zooms in on the spiral galaxies that populate the universe around us.

programme.title: Cosmic Vistas: Vanishing Points
programme.desc: The core of a galaxy attracts our eyes and makes up feel like we are gazing down a deep well. But this illusion conceals an even deeper truth.

programme.title: Cosmic Vistas: Hidden Havens: Icy Moons
programme.desc: There are hundreds of moons in our solar system. Could one of them be a hidden haven that harbors alien life forms?

programme.title: Cosmic Vistas: Icy Gems: Frozen Moons
programme.desc: In the far depths of space, out of reach of the Sun's warmth, water can only exist in a super solid state. Some small moons, in fact, are made entirely of ice. What stories do these Icy Gems have to tell about our solar system?

programme.title: Cosmic Vistas: Shooting Gallery: Asteroids and Comets
programme.desc: Scientist long thought that our solar system consisted of the sun, the planets, and their moons. We soon found that we are far from alone, often coming into contact with asteroids, comets, and other debris.

programme.title: Cosmic Vistas: Galactic Visions: Alien Worlds
programme.desc: The diversity, complexity, and downright beauty of our own solar system is astounding. Could such beauty exist in other parts of the universe as well? Thanks to modern science, we now have the capability to see for ourselves.

programme.title: Cosmic Vistas: Mars: Red Dawn
programme.desc: Landing a spacecraft on Mars is no easy task given our limited knowledge of the planet. The difference between success and failure can rely on the most minute detail.

programme.title: Cosmic Vistas: The Giant Planets: Lords of Gravity
programme.desc: Gravity is one of the most basic and powerful forces shaping our universe. Discover its nature within our own solar system, from the smallest moons to the largest planets.

programme.title: Cosmic Vistas: Outer Limits: Edge of the Solar System
programme.desc: For centuries, it was was thought that Saturn was the most distant planet in our Solar System. With the evolution of the telescope, we discovered the rest of our planets, both elusive and mysterious.

programme.title: Cosmic Vistas: Borderland
programme.desc: Deserts and dunes, cliffs and canyons. Although Mars is certainly an alien wasteland, it is a planet with terrestrial formations remarkably similar to those found on Earth.

programme.title: Cosmic Vistas: Silent Partner
programme.desc: Although we have put man on the moon, our silent partner still holds many mysteries. What haven't we seen? What haven't we discovered?

programme.title: Cosmic Vistas: Rocky Shores
programme.desc: The arid shores of other planets tell the stories of their past. What did they look like, and could they have ever supported life?

programme.title: Cosmic Vistas: Fountain of Creation
programme.desc: Without the Sun's warmth and light, life as we know it would not exist. It is the powerhouse of our planet and provides the energy we need to survive.

programme.title: Cosmic Vistas: Windows to Other Worlds S1 Ep1
programme.desc: As technology has advanced, we have been able to peer into distant reaches of space. From the first telescopes to high-tech satellites, these machines have been our windows to other worlds.

programme.desc: A Team Rocket trick takes all of Ash's hard-earned Johto Gym badges from him, but it's not long before the troublesome trio get a taste of their own medicine. What tricksy Pokémon could have beaten them at their own game?

programme.title: Pokémon: ¡Yo te elijo!
programme.desc: En un breve descanso para almorzar, Ash y sus amigos conocen a Todd Snap, un fotógrafo Pokémon que intenta conseguir una toma perfecta de Pikachu.

programme.title: Pokémon: ¡Yo te elijo!
programme.desc: Al darse cuenta de que hace tiempo que no gana ninguna Medalla de Gimnasio, Ash se inscribe al Examen de Admisión de la Liga Pokémon, ¡una gran oportunidad para demostrar que puede convertirse en un Maestro Pokémon!

programme.title: Pokémon: ¡Yo te elijo!
programme.desc: Ash y los chicos deciden visitar un centro de crianza que vieron en un comercial. Sin embargo, el centro encubre un plan diabólico de los miembros del Equipo Rocket, Butch y Cassidy, ¡viejos rivales de Jessie y James!

programme.title: Pokémon: aventuras en las Islas Naranja
programme.desc: ¡Misty y Jessie compiten para ser la Reina del Festival de la Princesa! Ash y Brock le prestan a Misty sus Pokémon para la batalla, y Jessie es derrotada a pesar de su Pokémon sorpresa.

programme.title: Pokémon: aventuras en las Islas Naranja
programme.desc: Es Día del Niño, y Ash y sus amigos ayudan a unos niños de una escuela a celebrarlo. El Equipo Rocket arruina la diversión llevándose a un niño en vez de a Pikachu. En un asombroso giro de eventos, Meowth se vuelve bueno… ¿o no?

programme.title: Pokémon: aventuras en las Islas Naranja
programme.desc: Nuestros héroes viajan a la Isla Cinnabar, donde Ash busca ganar la Medalla Volcán. Un extraño les dice acertijos para llegar al Gimnasio, ¡donde Ash y Pikachu tienen una feroz batalla con un Pokémon que nunca habían visto!

programme.title: Pokémon: aventuras en las Islas Naranja
programme.desc: Ash finalmente localiza el Gimnasio, ¡suspendido sobre una piscina de lava fundida! Sólo un fuerte Pokémon tipo Fuego puede ayudarlo en esta batalla por la Medalla Volcán, así que Ash debe confiar en su malcriado Charizard.

programme.title: Pokémon: aventuras en las Islas Naranja
programme.desc: Mientras Ash y los chicos se apresuran a abordar el último transbordador hacia la Isla Cinnabar, son desviados por un grupo de Squirtle, Wartortle y Blastoise que necesitan su ayuda.

programme.title: Pokémon: aventuras en las Islas Naranja
programme.desc: El Horsea de Misty necesita ejercicio desesperadamente, y los chicos deciden llevarlo al Gimnasio de sus hermanas en Ciudad Celeste. Ahí, ella descubre que sus hermanas están planeando un emocionante ballet bajo el agua.

programme.title: Pokémon: aventuras en las Islas Naranja
programme.desc: Ash, Brock y Misty se desvían camino a Ciudad Viridian cuando todas sus pertenencias desaparecen. Mientras buscan sus cosas perdidas, se ven envueltos en un encuentro cercano que de verdad está fuera de este mundo.

programme.title: Pokémon: aventuras en las Islas Naranja
programme.desc: Nuestros héroes llegan a Ciudad Viridian, donde Ash espera ganar la Medalla Tierra. Llegan al Gimnasio justo a tiempo para ver a su rival, Gary, derrotado por un Pokémon desconocido, ¡y Gary insiste en que es maligno!

programme.title: Pokémon: aventuras en las Islas Naranja
programme.desc: En su camino de vuelta a Pueblo Paleta, nuestros héroes encuentran a un Mr. Mime fugitivo. Ash se disfraza como otro Mr. Mime para poder acercarse. Cuando el Equipo Rocket ataca... ¿atraparán al Mr. Mime correcto?

programme.title: Pokémon: aventuras en las Islas Naranja
programme.desc: Nuestros héroes encuentran una desviación en el camino y deciden escalar una escarpada y peligrosa montaña. Pikachu se pierde, y todos deben trabajar juntos para encontrarlo, mantener el calor y enfrentar una tormenta.

programme.title: Pokémon: aventuras en las Islas Naranja
programme.desc: Al visitar al Profesor Oak, Ash se encuentra con Gary, y hablan de la próxima Liga Pokémon. El Profesor Oak dice que deberían aprender uno del otro en vez de competir, ¡y su trabajo rinde frutos cuando el Equipo Rocket ataca!

programme.title: Pokémon: aventuras en las Islas Naranja
programme.desc: Ash se une a su mamá en sus vacaciones en la Isla Espuma. Ahí, busca al programador del Pokédex para aprender de la inusual Evolución de SlowPoké. ¡El misterio es revelado por la incompetencia del Equipo Rocket!

programme.title: Pokémon: aventuras en las Islas Naranja
programme.desc: Cuando Ash fracasa al intentar surfear, Victor lo rescata y le cuenta acerca de Humungadunga, una ola gigante que aparece cada 20 años. ¿Podrán Ash y Pikachu darle a Victor la confianza necesaria para montar la ola gigante?

programme.title: Pokémon: aventuras en las Islas Naranja
programme.desc: De vuelta a Pueblo Paleta, Ash y sus amigos conocen a Florinda de la guardería. Su Gloom no evoluciona y cree no estarlo entrenando bien. Cuando el Equipo Rocket ataca, todos ven lo fuerte que puede volverse un Pokémon.

programme.title: Pokémon: aventuras en las Islas Naranja
programme.desc: ¡Un famoso director llega al pueblo, y todos quieren ser la estrella! Como él sólo quiere Pokémon en su película, Ash, Brock, Misty y el Equipo Rocket luchan para asegurarse que su Pokémon la protagonice junto a Wigglytuff.

programme.title: Pokémon: aventuras en las Islas Naranja
programme.desc: Cuando los chicos asisten al estreno de “Pokémon enamorado”, Meowth recuerda su doloroso pasado. Comparte la historia de su vida ante el Equipo Rocket, incluyendo cómo aprendió a caminar y a hablar como humano.

programme.title: Pokémon: aventuras en las Islas Naranja
programme.desc: A sólo tres semanas de iniciar la Liga Pokémon, Ash, Brock y Misty se dirigen al Monte Hideaway a buscar a uno de Élite 4. Buscan consejos de entrenamiento Pokémon, ¡pero descubren una tierra de enormes Onix en su lugar!

programme.title: Pokémon: aventuras en las Islas Naranja
programme.desc: Mientras Ash y Brock entrenan para la Liga Pokémon, hallan un templo con fósiles Pokémon. Misty recuerda una ciudad oculta donde la gente construye templos para los Pokémon. ¿Será esta la antigua ciudad de Pokémopolis?

programme.title: Pokémon: aventuras en las Islas Naranja
programme.desc: Camino al torneo de la Liga Pokémon en la Meseta Añil,, los chicos conocen a otro Entrenador. Desafortunadamente, sus Medallas de Gimnasio son robadas, así que no puede competir... ¡a menos que se lleve las medallas de Ash!

programme.title: Pokémon: aventuras en las Islas Naranja
programme.desc: La Liga Pokémon está a punto de empezar, con el encendido ceremonial de la antorcha, que lleva una llama del Pokémon Legendario Moltres. ¡Por supuesto, el Equipo Rocket trata de robarla!

programme.title: Pokémon: aventuras en las Islas Naranja
programme.desc: Es el primer día de la Liga Pokémon, y cuando Ash y sus amigos descubren que su primera batalla será en el Campo de Agua, están llenos de consejos.

programme.title: Pokémon: aventuras en las Islas Naranja
programme.desc: Al continuar la Liga Pokémon, Ash lucha en el Campo de Roca, ¡y tiene un encuentro con el Equipo Rocket luego de que instalan un Centro Pokémon falso para atraer a los Entrenadores incautos!

programme.title: Pokémon: aventuras en las Islas Naranja
programme.desc: ¡Ash enfrenta a su más duro oponente hasta ahora en el Campo de Planta en la Liga Pokémon! ¿Están él y su Bulbasaur listos para enfrentar a su oponente y a su poderoso Scyther?

programme.title: Pokémon: aventuras en las Islas Naranja
programme.desc: Cuando Ash conoce a un Entrenador parecido llamado Richie en la Liga Pokémon, los dos chicos pronto se vuelven amigos cercanos, ¡al igual que sus dos Pikachu!

programme.title: Pokémon: aventuras en las Islas Naranja

programme.title: Pokémon: aventuras en las Islas Naranja
programme.desc: Ash, Misty y Brock están en las gradas vitoreando a Richie cuando la Liga Pokémon llega a su fin y marchan juntos en las ceremonias de clausura. ¡Es una experiencia que acompañará a Ash durante todo su viaje como Entrenador!

programme.title: RiffTrax: Devil Girl From Mars
programme.desc: Pour a glass of scotch and join Bridget and Mary Jo as they riff this Sci Fi classic! This feature is a parody and contains the original movie combined with a comedic commentary by Bridget and Mary Jo from RiffTrax.

programme.title: RiffTrax: The Girl From Rio
programme.desc: The Girl From Rio is about the island nation of Femina, which is inhabited by superwomen. This feature is a parody and contains the original movie combined with a comedic commentary from RiffTrax (formerly of MST3K).

programme.title: RiffTrax Presents: Sherlock Holmes and the Woman in Green
programme.desc: Originally in black and white, the woman The Woman in Green was difficult to identify — but because of the wonder of colorization, Bridget and Mary Jo figure out who's wearing green almost immediately! The rest of the mystery is elementary.

programme.title: Rifftrax Shorts: Why Doesn't Cathy Eat Breakfast?
programme.desc: From the stars of Mystery Science Theater 3000 comes the comedic genius known as Rifftrax!

programme.title: Rifftrax Shorts: The Calendar: How To Use It
programme.desc: The Calendar. Whether you choose a Far Side page-a-day, an Anne Geddes year-of-horror or Twelve Months of Lifeguards that May Be Used as Flotation Devices, one thing is certain: none of us know how to use the damn things.

programme.title: RiffTrax: The Night That Dracula Saved The World
programme.desc: While The Night that Dracula Saved the World does not have Harvey Korman, or crappy animation, or an elderly wookie pleasuring itself, it does have Judd Hirsch. Please do not go into this special expecting not to see Judd Hirsch. Fair warning.

programme.title: RiffTrax Presents: Horror Express
programme.desc: The Deadly Mantis showed us that the life of a palaeontologist is one of intrigue, romance, and unstoppable monsters. Horror Express does nothing to dispel this notion, so that presumably means it can only be true.

programme.title: RiffTrax: Zombie Nightmare
programme.desc: The dead have risen and they're drinking Tim Hortons! This feature is a parody and contains the original movie combined with comedic commentary by Mike, Kevin, and Bill from MST3K.

programme.title: RiffTrax: Astro Zombies
programme.desc: Reuniting Tom “The Kid” Pace with his Girl in Gold Boots director Ted V. Mikels, Astro-Zombies are neither zombies nor the dog from The Jetsons. The film also stars John Carradine, who aged approximately 92 years in the 28 years.

programme.title: RiffTrax: Zombie I Eat Your Skin
programme.desc: A more accurate title would have been I Occasionally Chop Off Heads With a Machete Because I'm The Voodoo Kind Of Zombie, Not The BRAAAAINS Kind. This feature is a parody and contains the original movie combined with a comedic commentary from RiffTrax.

programme.title: RiffTrax: Blood Theatre
programme.desc: Every time the Blood Theatre opened for business, someone died. But this time, the theater has a good feeling about its chances! This feature is a parody and contains the original movie combined with a comedic commentary by RiffTrax.

programme.title: Sailor Moon Crystal

programme.title: Sailor Moon Crystal

programme.title: Sailor Moon Crystal

programme.title: Sailor Moon Crystal

programme.title: Sailor Moon Crystal
programme.desc: Tuxedo Mask is reported to have committed many crimes to obtain the 'Legendary Silver Crystal,' but Usagi doesn't believe it…

programme.title: Sailor Moon Crystal
programme.desc: Usagi learns Tuxedo Mask's identity is actually Mamoru Chiba. Meanwhile, brainwashed people in Usagi's town wander around looking for Sailor Moon.

programme.title: Sailor Moon Crystal

programme.title: Sailor Moon Crystal

programme.title: Sailor Moon Crystal
programme.desc: Sailor Moon and the others land on the moon to solve the mystery of the Legendary Silver Crystal.

programme.title: Sailor Moon Crystal
programme.desc: Appearing before a devastated Usagi is a man who looks just like Mamoru but goes by 'Endo'. Usagi sees traces of Mamoru and thus approaches him…

programme.title: Sailor Moon Crystal
programme.desc: Sailor Moon learns that Mamoru has become a soldier of the Dark Kingdom. She decides to take on Queen Beryl in an effort to get Mamoru back, but…

programme.title: Sailor Moon Crystal
programme.desc: To end her painful journey, Sailor Moon stabs Mamoru with the holy sword before turning it on herself.

programme.title: Sailor Moon Crystal
programme.desc: Sailor Moon must destroy Queen Metalia, who radiates a tremendously dark energy. The power of the Legendary Silver Crystal is finally released.

programme.title: Sailor Moon Crystal
programme.desc: Usagi and the others try to figure out the identity of Chibi-Usa, the mysterious girl who fell from the sky.

programme.title: Sailor Moon Crystal

programme.title: Sailor Moon Crystal

programme.title: Sailor Moon Crystal

programme.title: Sailor Moon Crystal

programme.title: Sailor Moon Crystal

programme.title: Sailor Moon Crystal

programme.title: Sailor Moon Crystal

programme.title: Sailor Moon Crystal

programme.title: Sailor Moon Crystal

programme.title: Sala de emergencias: Historias inéditas
programme.desc: Un hombre entra en shock anafiláctico; un tipo rudo teme a las agujas; un hombre se apuñala con una espada ninja; Un paciente cree que necesita un exorcismo.

programme.title: Sala de emergencias: Historias inéditas
programme.desc: Durante un partido de fútbol en la escuela secundaria, Jarret Hitchings, de 17 años, lleva el casco de un oponente al intestino. El Dr. César Aristeiguieta debe confiar en su entrenamiento previo como oficial de policía para ayudar.

programme.title: Sala de emergencias: Historias inéditas
programme.desc: Una niña, recientemente golpeada por un disco de hockey, ahora está misteriosamente paralizada de cintura para abajo; un joven se queja de un terrible dolor de cabeza.

programme.title: Sala de emergencias: Historias inéditas
programme.desc: Un jugador de fútbol adolescente sufre un derrame cerebral en la sala de emergencias; un médico de renombre relata su primer gran trauma como residente en la década de 1970.

programme.title: Sala de emergencias: Historias inéditas
programme.desc: Un soldado llega a la sala de emergencias con una puñalada y una mujer toma una sobredosis de píldoras de dieta.

programme.title: Sala de emergencias: Historias inéditas
programme.desc: Un paciente con accidente cerebro-vascular paralizado observa sin palabras y horrorizado mientras su esposa y sus 2 novias pelean por él.

programme.title: Sala de emergencias: Historias inéditas
programme.desc: Un hombre con picazón por la exposición al roble venenoso resulta que también tiene gusanos excavando en una herida en su espalda; una mujer joven tiene un labio sangrante.

programme.title: Sala de emergencias: Historias inéditas
programme.desc: Un paciente violento que finge estar en coma retiene a médicos y policías como rehenes después de robar el arma de un policía; una médica de urgencias en su día libre intenta salvar a su prima de un infarto.

programme.title: Sala de emergencias: Historias inéditas
programme.desc: Dos paracaidistas son llevados a urgencias; varios clientes de un club de baile dejan de respirar repentinamente; y una futura novia puede perderse su boda después de que su dedo se atasque en un frasco de maquillaje.

programme.title: Sala de emergencias: Historias inéditas
programme.desc: Un paciente parece estar alucinando y envía al personal de urgencias a una persecución inútil por el hospital; un médico recibe una descarga eléctrica que le detiene el corazón cuando toca a un paciente que está siendo desfibrilado

programme.title: Sala de emergencias: Historias inéditas
programme.desc: Una mujer embarazada no puede llegar al hospital a tiempo y debe dar a luz en el asiento delantero de su automóvil.

programme.title: Sala de emergencias: Historias inéditas
programme.desc: Un médico abre el pecho de una enfermera y toma su corazón en su mano, en un esfuerzo desesperado por salvarle la vida.

programme.title: Sala de emergencias: Historias inéditas
programme.desc: El dueño de una joyería de 63 años recibe un disparo en el pecho durante un robo fallido. La reputación de la Dra. Michelle Finkel da un giro, cuando involuntariamente envía al paciente equivocado para una ecografía testicular.

programme.title: Sala de emergencias: Historias inéditas
programme.desc: Una víctima de un apuñalamiento repentinamente comienza a tener convulsiones y sus médicos no pueden tratarlo hasta que descubran la causa.

programme.desc: Effects of passing through a wormhole give the Enterprise crew a sense that they were unconscious for more than the thirty seconds they've been led to believe.

programme.title: Star Trek: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Commander William Riker has been on an acculturation mission under an alias for months on the Arkonian planet.

programme.title: Star Trek: The Next Generation
programme.desc: While the Enterprise is in a star-base, Lt. Commander Geordi La Forge gets a very special visitor, brilliant engineering designer Dr. Leah Brahms, who he feels to know almost intimately as a 'hologram version' of herself with 'whom' he bonded.

programme.title: Star Trek: The Next Generation
programme.desc: The Enterprise has finally tracked the missing starship USS Britain. Counselor Deanna Troi senses trouble with the life on board and joins Riker's boarding party.

programme.title: Star Trek: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Lt. Commander Geordi La Forge and an old friend fight to defeat a parasite that is trying to transform them into another species.

programme.title: Star Trek: The Next Generation
programme.desc: When assigned to investigate an unknown probe, Lt. Barclay is electrocuted through a shuttlecraft's computer, where he receives an unexplainable boost of confidence and a vast increase in his knowledge.

programme.title: Star Trek: The Next Generation
programme.desc: The Enterprise is at Tegus 3, to host the Federation archaeologists council's annual symposium, where Picard is to give the key-note lecture on its enigmatic ruins, now forbidden to outsiders.

programme.title: Star Trek: The Next Generation
programme.desc: A retired admiral boards the Enterprise in an effort to determine the actions aboard the ship surrounding an act of sabotage and possible treason.

programme.title: Star Trek: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Counselor Troi's mother visits the Enterprise and becomes infatuated with a man whose culture forces him into a suicidal ritual called "The Resolution."

programme.title: Star Trek: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Dr. Crusher falls for someone who's not at all what she expects him to be.

programme.title: Star Trek: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Geordi is brainwashed by the Romulans to assassinate a Klingon ambassador.

programme.title: Star Trek: The Next Generation
programme.desc: When a female crew member is infatuated with Lieutenant Commander Data, he decides to give a romantic relationship a try. Also, the Enterprise finds itself having to maneuver through a dangerous nebula.

programme.title: Star Trek: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Both Capt. Picard and Lt. Worf must decide where their priorities lie as the Klingon Empire descends into civil war.

programme.title: Star Trek: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Picard risks all-out war with the Romulans when he involves Starfleet in a Klingon civil war.

programme.title: Star Trek: Voyager
programme.desc: The crew explores a remote planet inhabited by humans who were abducted by aliens in 1937

programme.title: Star Trek: Voyager
programme.desc: Chakotay faces an unlikely enemy: a Kazon boy who hopes to achieve warrior status by killing him.

programme.title: Star Trek: Voyager
programme.desc: The ship's holographic doctor experiences a world where illusion and reality collide.

programme.title: Star Trek: Voyager
programme.desc: The ship is surrounded by creatures whose presence accelerates Kes' reproductive process and threatens Voyager's key operating systems.

programme.title: Star Trek: Voyager
programme.desc: Ensign Harry Kim awakens on Earth, where he's shocked to learn there's no record of his assignment on Voyager.

programme.title: Star Trek: Voyager
programme.desc: A strange spatial distortion afflicts the ship and has the entire crew literally lost on their own ship.

programme.title: Star Trek: Voyager
programme.desc: Neelix and Paris must put aside their romantic rivalry over Kes after they crash-land on a toxic planet.

programme.title: Star Trek: Voyager
programme.desc: A mysterious force puts the crew in a delusional state that causes their most deeply buried thoughts and desires to surface.

programme.title: Star Trek: Voyager
programme.desc: Chakotay is stranded on a planet inhabited by natives with ties to his ancestors.

programme.title: Star Trek: Voyager
programme.desc: Kes makes contact with Ocampa spacefarers and the female Caretaker, who may have the power to send the crew home.

programme.title: Star Trek: Voyager
programme.desc: The theft of a transporter module by Kazon forces thrusts Chakotay into an explosive confrontation with his traitorous former lover Seska.

programme.title: Star Trek: Voyager
programme.desc: Janeway must escape from a city under siege by the Mokra, a brutal regime determined to crush the growing resistance movement against it.

programme.title: Star Trek: Voyager
programme.desc: After Torres reactivates a humanoid robot, she's drawn into a war between robotic enemies.

programme.title: Star Trek: Voyager
programme.desc: Hoping to strengthen Voyager's strategic position in the quadrant, Janeway reluctantly seeks an alliance with the Kazon.

programme.title: Stargate SG-1
programme.desc: When an SGC soldier under the influence of a Goa'uld mind-control device attempts to assassinate a High Council member, SG-1 must uncover other potential assassins, even amongst themselves, before the president arrives for a crucial Summit meeting!

programme.title: Stargate SG-1
programme.desc: After a visit to a strange planet in the middle of a geomagnetic storm they find themselves repeating the same day over and over again. The team must utilize their accumulated knowledge to stop the time loop before there are disastrous consequences.

programme.title: Stargate SG-1
programme.desc: SG-1 joins forces with a Russian scientist to investigate a rogue Stargate in Siberia, linked to a mysterious water planet. The team must venture via submarine to the water planet, where they encounter an unexpectedly terrifying alien presence.

programme.title: Stargate SG-1
programme.desc: During an archaeological survey of fossils on a Goa'uld planet, Daniel is abducted by a fearsome creature, prompting SG-1 to embark on a mission to free him. But Daniel soon learns that the creature's intentions are not what he thought!

programme.title: Stargate SG-1
programme.desc: After relocating an endangered civilization to a safe new planet, the team realizes that another race of aliens is planning to incinerate the planet's surface to make it inhabitable. Will SG-1 be able to reason with the marauding aliens?

programme.title: Stargate SG-1
programme.desc: With memories erased and identities changed, SG-1 find themselves trapped below a domed city on a planet of ice, toiling as slave laborers. Can they come to their senses and make a break for the surface, or will they remain enslaved underground?

programme.title: Stargate SG-1
programme.desc: When a quirky conspiracy theorist contacts SG-1 claiming to know classified information about the Stargate, at first they think he's bluffing. But when they investigate his wild claims, they realize he's a lot closer to the truth than they thought.

programme.title: Stargate SG-1
programme.desc: When O'Neill and Teal'c take an SGC-modified Goa'uld glider out for a test flight, they lose control and are sucked into outer space by a Goa'uld tracking device. It's up to the team to rescue them, before they run out oxygen and life support.

programme.title: Stargate SG-1
programme.desc: When Daniel Jackson returns to Chicago to attend the funeral of his mentor, a celebrated archaeologist, he soon realizes that the death is mysteriously connected to the recent discovery of a 10,000-year-old Egyptian artifact that might be cursed.

programme.title: Stargate SG-1
programme.desc: SG-1 travels to a remote interplanetary minefield to sabotage a hazardous alliance between two powerful Goa'uld System Lords. But their mission becomes far more dangerous when they realize Teal'c has been captured by one of the Lords.

programme.title: Stargate SG-1
programme.desc: When SGC commander Gen. Hammond steps down saying he's too old for the job, SG-1 suspects foul play. When a hard-nosed new general steps in to replace him and splits up SG-1, they vow to solve the mystery and get their beloved General back.

programme.title: Stargate SG-1
programme.desc: A decade in the future, Earth's alliance with a highly intelligent race of aliens has rendered SGC obsolete. But when Carter, now married to an ambassador, uncovers a terrifying secret, she must reassemble SG-1 to send an urgent message to the past.

programme.title: Stargate SG-1
programme.desc: When a chosen boy is brought to SGC, he sends a telepathic message, causing Daniel's personality to undergo disturbing changes. Will the rest of SG-1 be able to solve the mystery of the boy's origin before he becomes a power-hungry warmonger?

programme.title: Stargate SG-1
programme.desc: SG-1 travels to a planet to investigate a machine that induces narcotic pleasure. But when they try to leave the planet, they are overcome with debilitating withdrawal symptoms, forcing them to stay. Can they free themselves from this addiction?

programme.title: Strawberry Shortcake
programme.desc: Annie Oatmeal hires both Strawberry Shortcake and Angel Cake to work at her dude ranch.

programme.title: Strawberry Shortcake
programme.desc: Strawberry gets an unsettling message from her friend Caramel Corn, who owns a quaint little farm out in the Strawberryland countryside.

programme.title: Strawberry Shortcake
programme.desc: It’s a retelling of L. Frank Baum’s classic 'Wonderful Wizard of Oz' – told from Pupcake’s point of view.

programme.title: Strawberry Shortcake
programme.desc: When Strawberry gets an urgent plea to return to Oz, she finds that there’s an environmental disaster in the works.

programme.title: Strawberry Shortcake
programme.desc: It’s a retelling of 'Sleeping Beauty' – but our focus is on the fairy that didn’t get her invitation and stubbornly refuses to listen to the reason why.

programme.title: Strawberry Shortcake's Berry Bitty Adventures
programme.desc: A problem in the sparkleberry juice system that powers the town keeps the girls from doing their work—to the frustration of Cherry Jam, who is struggling to write a song.

programme.title: Strawberry Shortcake's Berry Bitty Adventures
programme.desc: Unable to sleep with the noise of an all-night construction crew of Berrykins trying to get the power turned back on, Strawberry and the girls go on a campout.

programme.title: Strawberry Shortcake's Berry Bitty Adventures
programme.desc: While building a new Dog Park, Huck finds the Good Luck Charm that Cherry wrongly believes gives her the ability to sing difficult notes.

programme.title: Strawberry Shortcake's Berry Bitty Adventures
programme.desc: The girls plan an elegant afternoon tea party to inaugurate the town’s new dog park, but encounter a mystery when the guests of honor, their puppies, strangely refuse to enter, and no one can figure out why.

programme.title: Strawberry Shortcake's Berry Bitty Adventures
programme.desc: Blueberry invites Huck to attend Berry Bitty City’s big Masquerade Ball in honor of their new dog park. A screwball comedy of errors ensues when Blueberry gets a cold and has to stay home.

programme.title: Strawberry Shortcake's Berry Bitty Adventures
programme.desc: The girls decide to each bake Berrykin Bloom the perfect cupcake, to be presented at a ceremony honoring him for his achievements in Berryculture.

programme.title: Strawberry Shortcake's Berry Bitty Adventures
programme.desc: Lemon and Raspberry hire twins Sweet & Sour to help out in Strawberry's café, so Strawberry will have time to appear in an internet fashion contest.

programme.title: Rainbow Ruby
programme.desc: During a camping trip in the forest, the Rainbow Village friends see a “monster” and almost cancel the trip. // When Princess Kiki chips her leg before a ballet performance, Rainbow Ruby must take the stage to save the day!

programme.title: Rainbow Ruby
programme.desc: Thunderbell's scooter breaks, and he must deliver packages on foot, which is slow and painful. // When Ling Ling's group portrait gift is ruined, Rainbow Ruby secretly takes photos and surprises him with a photo album of all of their friends.

programme.title: Rainbow Ruby
programme.desc: When the restaurant is overrun with customers who aren't being served properly, Rainbow Ruby becomes a Waitress. // When Ruby's spilled marbles pour down on Rainbow Village, Rainbow Ruby becomes a Paramedic to treat the wounded.

programme.title: Rainbow Ruby
programme.desc: Jessy's upset because everyone forgot the anniversary of the day she arrived in Rainbow Village. Rainbow Ruby becomes a Chef to cheer her up. // When Ling Ling's cold won't go away, Doctor Ruby discovers his problem is really allergies.

programme.title: Strawberry Shortcake
programme.desc: This is the story of 'Rapunzel', but with a twist. Princess Rapunzel (Rainbow Sherbet) has always preferred being called Rap and liked doing things her way.

programme.title: Strawberry Shortcake
programme.desc: Strawberry Shortcake’s childhood friend, Lime Lite, has hit it big in Berrywood, movie capital of Strawberryland.

programme.title: Strawberry Shortcake
programme.desc: When Strawberryland’s one movie theatre goes out of business, Strawberry has an idea to save it: she and her friends can film a movie to show there and attract crowds back to the theatre.

programme.title: Strawberry Shortcake
programme.desc: Strawberry Shortcake is planning a first birthday party for her sister Apple Dumpling, so she sets off on an adventure to find the perfect party supplies.

programme.title: Strawberry Shortcake
programme.desc: Strawberry Shortcake travels to magical Holidayland with Honey Pie Pony, searching for the perfect presents to give her friends.

programme.title: Strawberry Shortcake's Berry Bitty Adventures
programme.desc: Strawberry's world-traveling cousin Apple Dumplin' stops at Berry Bitty City. What starts as a brief visit becomes a series of comical misadventures.

programme.title: Strawberry Shortcake's Berry Bitty Adventures
programme.desc: Lemon and Raspberry's fashion podcast is saved by Apple, then almost sabotaged by Sweet and Sour when Lemon's 'mood hair' runs amok.

programme.title: Strawberry Shortcake's Berry Bitty Adventures
programme.desc: When Sour wishes she could have a birthday all her very own, her twin sister Sweet grants her wish by forgoing celebrating her birthday.

programme.title: Strawberry Shortcake's Berry Bitty Adventures

programme.title: Strawberry Shortcake's Berry Bitty Adventures
programme.desc: At the girls' campout, Sour launches into a whopper of a yarn about the adventures she and Sweet had in the 'Berry Deep Dark Forest.'

programme.title: Strawberry Shortcake's Berry Bitty Adventures

programme.title: Strawberry Shortcake's Berry Bitty Adventures

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Morticia and Gomez are worried about Cousin Itt because he spends his days sleeping and dreaming in his tiny room. They decide that Itt would make an excellent marriage counselor, and pretend to be a couple with a failing marriage.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: A recording company's platter of Lurch's gravelly voice brings a screaming mob of teenage fans to the Addams house. To calm the crowd, Lurch seats himself at the harpsichord and rewards his fans with a song to end all songs.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Taken in by a psychologist's pronouncement that the only happily married couples are those who fight members of the Addams household devise schemes to start a battle between Gomez (John Astin) and Morticia (Carolyn Jones).

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Gomez decides to bolster Cousin Itt's failing ego by making him the star of a production aimed as a birthday surprise for Wednesday. He hires the great director, Eric von Bissell, who gives Itt elocution lessons, causing a Hollywood star complex.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: While Morticia and Gomez are celebrating their 13th wedding anniversary, she tells Wednesday and Pugsley a bedtime story of how she and Gomez first met. In this episode, Carolyn Jones plays Morticia, Morticia as a 22-year-old, and sister Ophelia.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Wednesday and Pugsley refuse to go to bed until they hear the rest of the courtship story. Morticia resumes the tale via flashback, including the ceremony beginning with Ophelia Frump, Morticia's balmy sister, as the bride.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Romance seems close for Thing, the Addams right-hand-in-a-box, when Gomez's aunt arrives for a visit accompanied by Lady Fingers, her handmaiden. Thing enjoys the visit most because it gives him a chance to hold hands with one of his own kind.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Morticia and Gomez visit Mayor Henson to complain that their property tax is ridiculously low. After the Mayor proves his incompetence by offering a refund, Gomez is persuaded to become a candidate for the office.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: During a welcome home party for Cousin Itt, Morticia notices that the diminutive guest of honor seems to be losing his hair. Uncle Fester experiments with his chemistry set to produce a concoction that grows hair and tries the remedy on Itt.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Wednesday and Pugsley return in tears from trick-or-treating because a neighbor has told them there is no such thing as a witch. Morticia and Gomez plan to prove to the children that they do exist--by summoning a witch to a séance.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Determined to correct the dreadful literature that Wednesday and Pugsley are exposed to, Morticia sets out to create a new literary world. Gomez fears that his wife's first manuscript is so good, that once the publisher reads it he will lose her.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: In need of artistic fulfillment, Morticia takes up sculpting. An art critic views her first endeavor--a three-eyed Gomez statue--and clubs it with his cane. Gomez, who won't have Morticia's heart broken gets a seedy art dealer to buy it.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Pugsley copies one of his dad's old love letters and sends it to his teacher. Miss Dunbar comes to visit the Addams home and confesses to Gomez that no man has ever fallen so in love with her, leading Morticia to pretend to be the jealous wife.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: After Wednesday befriends a new boy her age, Robespierre Courtney, Morticia invites his parents, Mr. and Mrs. Henry Courtney to visit the Addams house for tea. Unbeknownst to them, the Courtney's are hoping to meet a number of the social set.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: There is a neighborhood burglar on the loose, and Morticia has reason to believe it could be Gomez. Morticia decides to probe his subconscious mind for a key to his criminality after she and Uncle Fester discover loot hidden in the storeroom.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Morticia's pet plant Cleopatra gobbles up her favorite photo of Gomez from the family album. When the original photographer is found and asked to make a duplicate picture, it is discovered that he is now with the Department of Motor Vehicles.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Gomez plays host to Don Xavier Molines, a family friend during his childhood in Spain, and his daughter Consuella. Morticia's hospitality is put to the test when Consuella reveals that she has been promised in marriage to Gomez since childhood.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: When Wednesday's and Pugsley's faith in Santa Claus is shaken, Uncle Fester is chosen to back up Santa in case the real St. Nick is too busy to come. However, Fester-Santa gets stuck in the chimney, so each of the other adults fills in for him.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Fester is so smitten upon receipt of a photo of his love, a bearded carnival lady, that he borrows stamp money to mail her a proposal. Morticia dons a beard and poses as the mother to convince Fester that he will have to work to support a wife.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Because she thinks Fester (Jackie Coogan) and Grandmama (Blossom Rock) are spoiling the children, Morticia (Carolyn Jones) hires a governess. Insulted, Fester paints a white line down the center of the Addams house, dividing it in half.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Morticia and Gomez see Fester conferring with TV muscleman Jack LaGrann (Jack LaLanne), and think that Fester is planning a television career. However, Uncle Fester confides to Lurch that he has to go on a secret diet and exercise.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Morticia and Gomez find Grandfather Pegleg's treasure map and summon Captain Grimby. They hope to charter his boat for the treasure hunt. But after meeting the Captain, Morticia is careful to keep the nature of the mission secret.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Ophelia Frump is madly in love with Horatio Bartholomew, the man who has everything, except the truth about her relatives. Morticia, not convinced by Bartholomew, persuades playboy Cousin Itt to stir the embers of his past romance with Ophelia.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Pugsley shocks his parents when he gives up his new atomic reactor as kid stuff and announces that he wants to find his own job. His first try is as a medical assistant to Dr. Bird. He turns up, scalpel in hand, ready to help during an operation.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Grandma Frump (guest star Margaret Hamilton), comes to the mistaken conclusion that her daughter, Morticia (Carolyn Jones), and Gomez (John Astin) plan to pack her off to an old folks home. Actually, they plan to send her to a beauty farm.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Morticia, in order to be part of the National Beautification Program, decides to become a home decorator and offers her services to the neighbors. Next door neighbor, and insurance agent, Joe Digby hires Morticia in hopes of selling them insurance.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Ophelia taunts Uncle Fester into announcing that he is going to join the Peace Corps. Fester feels he's a cinch to be accepted because Gomez plans to pull strings in Washington on his behalf. The entire family agrees to help him study for the exam.

programme.title: The Amazing Race
programme.desc: The four remaining teams depart the Pit Stop at Marina Barrage in Singapore and fly to Shanghai, China.

programme.title: The Amazing Race
programme.desc: The four remaining teams depart the Pit Stop at the Shanghai Science and Technology Museum, with Louie and Michael knowing a Speed Bump awaits them.

programme.title: The Amazing Race
programme.desc: Brent and Caite, Jet and Cord, and Dan and Jordan leave Shanghai and head to San Francisco and the finish line.

programme.title: The Amazing Race

programme.desc: One team considers using their precious Express Pass after playful Ghanaian locals give some teams a headache while they struggle to complete the high-stakes roadblock.

programme.title: The Amazing Race
programme.desc: A challenging detour tests one couple's relationship, while another team's Racer requires medical attention, threatening their position in the competition.

programme.title: The Amazing Race
programme.desc: After teams volunteer at a local school in Ghana, THE AMAZING RACE makes it's first-ever trip to the Arctic Circle, where one couple finds themselves in an unfortunate position and contemplate making a game changing decision.

programme.title: The Amazing Race
programme.desc: A vegetarian racer struggles with a difficult decision when faced with a Norwegian delicacy, and Teams face their fears of heights during a gut-wrenching Roadblock.

programme.title: The Amazing Race
programme.desc: Racers struggle to complete their creative detours before putting in a proper day's work in the fields, where they discover the key to potato farming is manure.

programme.title: The Amazing Race
programme.desc: Teams are clowning around when they learn a traditional Russian circus act, but it's no joke when multiple teams make a critical error and misread a clue, jeopardizing their positions in the Race.

programme.title: The Amazing Race
programme.desc: Following a huge mistake, one Racer makes an important decision that will impact their team beyond the finish line and for the rest of their lives.

programme.title: The Amazing Race
programme.desc: Tension among the teams runs high when, for the first time ever, two teams are U-turned and have to complete an extra task, jeopardizing their chances of making it to the final four.

programme.title: The Amazing Race

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: Ballistics: A corpse is found with a gunshot wound to the head; the weapon lies next to the victim. It looks like suicide, but could it be murder? It's a question best solved by ballistics experts.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: Anytime, anywhere, people disappear – kidnapped from their daily routines. Predators always leave clues behind, but chasing them takes time, hampering investigators' attempts to solve these fatal abductions.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: In criminal investigations, a simple clue can provide the missing link by placing a suspect at a crime scene. Dirt left on shoes, tires or clothes, or even a tiny piece of plastic can pinpoint a crime scene.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: A southeastern Virginia community is stunned by a crime no one can believe. A pregnant woman murdered, her baby lost. Across the state, another town feels a similar shock, a brutal, random slaying in a most unexpected setting.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: The show examines cases of poison and deadly chemistry and shows how forensic experts are solving mysterious deaths today and from the past.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: Terrorism: Thanks to new technology and, perhaps, the approaching millennium, terrorism is a growing international threat. The Oklahoma City explosion and the bombing of the World Trade Center are just two of the incidents of this growing problem.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: A good coroner provides what's necessary to solve a crime. A bad one can spoil an otherwise rock-solid case. Cyril Wecht and Henry Lee, two of the country's most respected coroners, share their cases and insights into crime solving.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: The tiniest residue left at the scene can become a mark of distinction in the most singular and intimate of ways.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: Most victims of multiple murderers are meticulously chosen because of a mutual connection with the killer or because they match an intricate set of criteria that fits the killer's MO.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: Lies and deceit can often throw investigators off the trail of justice. But when hard evidence contradicts a killer's story, police must use the clues to piece together the truth.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: Poison is the subtlest form of death, and investigators must see through unusual circumstances to bring these murders to light.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: For the forensic entomologist, the insects that nest in dead bodies are like tiny witnesses to a crime.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: In San Diego, California, a killer has left behind pieces of evidence. Detectives must sort through these small clues to prove murder.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: Some cases simply can't be solved with current technology or with the evidence at hand. But that doesn't mean they'll remain unsolved forever.

programme.title: Floyd Mayweather vs DeMarcus Corley

programme.title: Floyd Mayweather vs Diego Corrales
programme.desc: On January 20th, 2001 Floyd Mayweather faced Diego Corrales in a battle for the WBC World super feather weight titles at the MGM Grand in Las Vegas ending in a technical knockout victory for Mayweather.

programme.title: Floyd Mayweather vs Hector Arroyo
programme.desc: On January 9th, 1998, Floyd Mayweather fought Hector Arroyo in a featherweight bout in Biloxi, Mississippi. A young Mayweather hungry for a title shot came out quick against Arroyo, stopping him in the fifth round of the fight.

programme.title: Floyd Mayweather vs Larry O'Shields
programme.desc: On June 14th, 1997, Floyd Mayweather fought Larry O'Shields in a lightweight bout at the Alamodome in San Antonio, Texas. A young Mayweather showed his impressive speed and agility, earning a unanimous decision victory.

programme.title: Floyd Mayweather vs Manny Pacquiao
programme.desc: On May 2nd, 2015, Floyd Mayweather fought Manny Pacquiao in what was labeled as the "Fight of the Century." Floyd Mayweather emerged victorious via a unanimous decision, showcasing his exceptional defensive skills against Pacquiao's aggressive style.

programme.title: Floyd Mayweather vs Phillip N'dou
programme.desc: On November 1st, 2003 Floyd Mayweather and Phillip N'dou fought eachother for the WBC world lightweight title at the Van Andel Arena in Grand Rapids with Mayweather ending the bout early for a technical knockout victory

programme.title: Floyd Mayweather vs Zab Judah
programme.desc: On April 8th, 2006, Floyd Mayweather fought Zab Judah for the IBF and IBO Welterweight Titles at Thomas & Mack Center in Las Vegas. In a fight with a dramatic melee in round 10, Mayweather cruised in the later rounds to win by unanimous decision.

programme.title: Freddie Roach vs Joe Ruelaz
programme.desc: On August 9th, 1984, Freddie Roach fought Joe Ruelaz in a super featherweight bout in Las Vegas. The more experienced Roach made easy work of Ruelaz, stopping him in the fourth round.

programme.title: Freddie Roach vs Mario Chavez
programme.desc: On May 28th, 1981 Freddie Roach faced Mario Chavez at the Hacienda Hotel in Las Vegas resulting in a unanimous decision win for Roach.

programme.title: Genaro Hernandez vs Azumah Nelson
programme.desc: On March 22nd, 1997, Genaro Hernandez fought Azumah Nelson for the World Super Featherweight Championship at the Memorial Coliseum in Corpus Christi. Hernandez looked like the more confident fighter, earning a close split decision victory.

programme.title: George Foreman vs Adilson Rodrigues
programme.desc: On June 16th, 1990 George Foreman fought Adilson Rodrigues at Caesars Palace in Las Vegas resulting in a victory for Foreman in round two by technical knockout.

programme.title: George Foreman vs Alex Stewart
programme.desc: On April 11th, 1992 George Foreman faced Alex Stewart at the Thomas & Mack Center in Las Vegas ending in a majority decision victory for Foreman.

programme.title: George Foreman vs Gerry Cooney
programme.desc: On January 15th, 1990 George Foreman and Gerry Cooney fought at the Reno-Sparks Convention Center in Reno, Las Vegas ending in a majority decision victory for Foreman.
